title: Screen Pop-Out (Push Toward Camera)
result_description: Your hand pushes out of a screenshot of your own Instagram post toward the viewer.

inputs.name: push_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Push your hand toward the camera.

inputs.name: post_screenshot
inputs.what_to_film: Screenshot of one of your Instagram posts.

params.note: fit exactly over the post in the screenshot
move under original; crop to where hand pops out

result.description: Hand breaks the frame of the post.
success_criteria: Pop-out aligns with the post edge

narration_transcript: Here's how to create this pop out effect for your next video. First, film yourself pushing something towards the camera, then take a screenshot of one of your Instagram posts. Take those two clips into CapCut and set the video as an overlay and crop that video so it fits in place of the original post that you screenshot it. Then duplicate the video, move it under the original and crop it to where you want your hand to pop out. Go to remove background and remove everything but your hand in the note. Get any text, sound effects and you'll get
